items.why: Two historic lighthouses offering scenic views and local maritime history — a picturesque and free-to-visit attraction on the island.
items.location_text: Port Boca Grande Lighthouse Museum, Boca Grande, FL

items.name: Fort De Soto Park
items.why: A 5-island chain with nationally ranked beaches, a historic Spanish-American War fort, campsites, and a museum — a fascinating nature and history combo near St. Pete.
items.location_text: Fort De Soto Park, St. Petersburg, FL
items.creator: thefloridaqueenie

items.name: Bean Point Beach
items.why: The secluded northern tip of Anna Maria Island offers clear blue water, uncrowded white sand, and that magical old-Florida beach vibe locals treasure.
items.location_text: Bean Point Beach, north end of Anna Maria Island, FL
items.creator: thefloridaqueenie

items.name: Johan Fust Community Library
items.why: One of Florida's most charming community libraries — a beautiful, photogenic hidden gem in Boca Grande worth a stop for book lovers and curious travelers alike.
items.location_text: Johan Fust Community Library, Boca Grande, FL
items.creator: thefloridaqueenie

items.name: Oxford Exchange
items.why: A stunning Tampa institution blending a beautiful bookstore, afternoon tea restaurant, coffee bar, tea bar, champagne bar, and high-end home goods all under one gorgeous roof.
items.creator: thefloridaqueenie
